findings.message:
Reentrancy in FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#201-270):
	External calls:
	- (success,None) = winner.call{value: pool.goodValue}() (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#253)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- pool.balance -= pool.goodValue (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#257)
	FinancialPoolManager.pools (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#62) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#103-118)
	- FinancialPoolManager.createPool(string,uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#75-97)
	- FinancialPoolManager.deletePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#124-134)
	- FinancialPoolManager.getPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#318-347)

	- FinancialPoolManager.selectWinner(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#277-310)

findings.name: reentrancy-eth

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#201-270) uses a dangerous strict equality:
	- participant.payments == duePayments && ! participant.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#241)
findings.name: incorrect-equality

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.participateInPool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#140-165) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Pool is not accepting participants) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#143-146)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.payInstallment(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#201-270) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(active)),Pool is not active) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#204-207)
	- require(bool,string)(msg.value == pool.installmentValue,Incorrect installment value) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#219)
	- block.timestamp > pool.activationDate (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#223)
	- duePayments > pool.installments (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#226)
	- require(bool,string)(participant.payments < duePayments + 1,Too many payments made) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#232)
	- require(bool,string)(participant.payments < pool.installments,All installments already paid) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#233)
	- participant.payments == duePayments && ! participant.received (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#241)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.deletePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#124-134) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(msg.sender == pool.owner,Only pool owner can delete) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#127)
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Pool is not in accepting participants status) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#128-131)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.activatePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#103-118) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(msg.sender == pool.owner,Only pool owner can activate) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#106)
	- require(bool,string)(pool.totalParticipants >= pool.minParticipants,Not enough participants to activate) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#107-110)
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Pool is not accepting participants) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#111-114)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
FinancialPoolManager.leavePool(uint256) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#171-195) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- require(bool,string)(keccak256(bytes)(bytes(pool.status)) == keccak256(bytes)(bytes(accepting_participants)),Pool is not accepting participants) (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#174-177)
findings.name: timestamp

findings.message:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (../sb/Consorcio_F.sol#8)
findings.name: solc-version
